name: Sediment Core Geophysical Properties from MSM44 Cruise at 75.98N 66.05W
description: Geophysical and sedimentological measurements from a single sediment core collected during the MSM44 cruise on July 12, 2015. The dataset includes P-wave travel time, P-wave velocity (Vp-a), acoustic grain size (AGR), core diameter deviation, and depth measurements (sediment and section) for a specific location in the Arctic Ocean.
